title: Enel’s Rule Becomes Clear
description: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene centers on Luffy, Enel, Usopp, Wyper, Shandia warrior. After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shit!!! His heart is still beating!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What!? That's no good! This is terrible!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What evil plot are you planning!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They've been working hard for me.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They're very good for manual labor.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yahahaha! Cracks me up every time!

summary: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
